Explanation: Using selectFrom(KV) fetches all columns from the KV table into a KvRecord, but only the KV_VALUE column is needed. Consider using select(KV.KV_VALUE).from(KV) to fetch only the required column.
Using selectFrom(KV) fetches all columns from the KV table into KvRecord objects. Consider using select(KV.KV_KEY, KV.KV_VALUE).from(KV) to explicitly specify the columns needed.
